data.title: Brazil's Brava Energia rises after February production data
data.description:
** Shares in Brazilian oil firm Brava Energia rise after it released February production data

** Brava hit record production levels in the month, it says, citing that was the result of investment and improvement in its main hubs

** The company posted a 9.2% increase in total production from January

** Analysts at JPMorgan highlight the fact that most fields outperformed previous months

** "Offshore result was the highlight, with production increasing 17.9%, as Atlanta improves operational efficiency and Papa-Terra ramp-up production," they said in a note to clients

** Shares in Brava rise almost 10%, making it biggest gainer on Brazil's benchmark stock index Bovespa , which is up 1%

data.title: Valereum Extends Timeline for Capital Investment Agreement
data.description:
Valereum (VLRM.AQ) extended the closing for a recently announced capital investment deal to complete certain steps such as due diligence and receipt of source of funds.

The financial technology company said Friday it initially expected the agreement to close Tuesday.

According to a February head of terms announcement, DMC will acquire a 48.86% stake in Valereum.

data.title: Huron Consulting Group Director Sells Shares
data.description:
Reporter NameRoth James H
RelationshipDirector
TypeSell
Amount$1,278,364
SEC FilingForm 4

James H. Roth, a Director at Huron Consulting Group, sold 8,642 shares of Common Stock on March 5, 2025, for a total sale amount of $1,278,364. The sales were executed at weighted average prices of $146.82, $147.98, and $148.66 across three transactions. Following these transactions, Roth directly owns 73,563 shares and indirectly owns 3,855 shares through Family LLC. The sales occurred automatically under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on May 18, 2024.
